name: downstage-site

scripts.build:editor: make wasm && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.build:site: npm run build:assets && npm run build:editor && eleventy
scripts.serve:site: npm run build:assets && npm run build:editor && eleventy --serve

//overrides: ws pin overrides eleventy-dev-server's transitive ws@8.20.0 (GHSA-58qx-3vcg-4xpx, uninitialized memory disclosure). Drop the override when @11ty/eleventy-dev-server releases a version that pins ws@^8.20.1 or newer. Tracked in issue #189.
